citations.narrative:
The rabbit outdoor primary enclosure did not contain the rabbits on 5/27/26. 5 rabbits were able to escape their enclosure
when farm employees did not securely close the gate to the enclosure while they were installing sod in the enclosure pen.
Per this Section, all primary enclosures shall be structurally sound/maintained to contain the rabbits. Failure to close and
secure the gate/door of a primary enclosure does not ensure a primary enclosure will contain the animals and can result
in escape. Four of the five rabbits were recaptured unharmed within a couple of days, and the fifth rabbit is staying next to
the enclosure in a space underneath the barn. The fifth rabbit needs to be recaptured, and employees must ensure that
the gate/door of the rabbit enclosure is secured whenever they enter/exit the enclosure. Correct by 6/8/26.
This inspection and exit briefing were conducted with facility representatives.
*END OF REPORT*
n

narrative:
3.53(a)(1) 
   
Primary enclosures. 
The rabbit outdoor primary enclosure did not contain the rabbits on 5/27/26. 5 rabbits were able to escape their enclosure 
when farm employees did not securely close the gate to the enclosure while they were installing sod in the enclosure pen.  
 
Per this Section, all primary enclosures shall be structurally sound/maintained to contain the rabbits. Failure to close and 
secure the gate/door of a primary enclosure does not ensure a primary enclosure will contain the animals and can result 
in escape. Four of the five rabbits were recaptured unharmed within a couple of days, and the fifth rabbit is staying next to 
the enclosure in a space underneath the barn. The fifth rabbit needs to be recaptured, and employees must ensure that 
the gate/door of the rabbit enclosure is secured whenever they enter/exit the enclosure. Correct by 6/8/26. 
 
This inspection and exit briefing were conducted with facility representatives.  
 
*END OF REPORT* 
 
 n
